subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast been tried in the path of God! The written scroll of thy presence hath been unfolded and gazed upon with seeing eyes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ابتلا فی سبیل الله ورق مسطور آنجناب رق منشور شد و بلحاظ و منظور گردید از
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @consolation and comfort, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat]
